revision.comment: 「[[モジュール:Error/styles.css]]」を保護しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]: 使用数135,000 ([編集=管理者のみ許可] (無期限) [移動=管理者のみ許可] (無期限))
1 revision imported: importing again with the templates
Adding [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:List of Shikinaisha]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:List of Shikinaisha]]</noinclude>"

Adding [[Category:qq]]<noinclude>[[Category:Attempt at corrected List of Shikinaisha]][[Category:jawiki link]][[ja:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
I am shocked at how hard this import was but doing it again. Programmatically changed the xml to reimport and fix the problems I introduced
1 revision imported: running a new import to try to fix the horrible consequences of that
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Immanuelle moved page [[モジュール:Error/styles.css]] to [[Module:Error/styles.css]] without leaving a redirect: Text replacement - "モジュール" to "Module"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Fixed imported list of Shikinaisha and templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Fixed imported list of Shikinaisha and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "{subst:PAGENAME}" to "{{subst:PAGENAME}}"
Text replacement - "{{{subst:PAGENAME}}}" to "{{subst:PAGENAME}}"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove [[Category:テンプレートスタイル]] from page
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24314731306|commit triggered pipeline]]
